title: LLM Backend Integration
description: Agent sends prompts to multiple LLM backends (Anthropic, OAI-compatible, MiniMax); manages streaming, token counting, history compression, and thinking modes

actors.name: Agent
actors.description: The orchestrating agent (via ToolClient or NativeToolClient) that submits prompts and processes responses

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Configures API credentials and session parameters via mykey.py / mykey.json

actors.name: Anthropic API
actors.description: Claude API — reached by ClaudeSession (text protocol) or NativeClaudeSession (native tool protocol) via /messages endpoint

actors.name: OAI-Compatible API
actors.description: OpenAI-style /chat/completions or /responses endpoint — used by LLMSession and NativeOAISession; covers GPT, OpenRouter, Kimi/Moonshot, MiniMax OAI path

actors.name: MiniMax API
actors.description: MiniMax endpoint — accessible via both OAI path (/v1 → LLMSession) and Anthropic path (/anthropic → NativeClaudeSession)

use_cases.name: Load API Credentials
use_cases.description: Load mykey.py (import) or mykey.json (file fallback) to populate mykeys dict and global proxies. Triggered lazily via module __getattr__.
use_cases.notes: Raises Exception if neither mykey.py nor mykey.json found

use_cases.name: Configure Session
use_cases.description: Instantiate a session class (ClaudeSession, LLMSession, NativeClaudeSession, NativeOAISession) from a config dict with apikey, apibase, model, context_win, temperature, max_tokens, stream, thinking_type, thinking_budget_tokens, reasoning_effort, api_mode
use_cases.notes: api_mode: 'chat_completions' (default) or 'responses'. reasoning_effort validated against {none,minimal,low,medium,high,xhigh}. thinking_type validated against {adaptive,enabled,disabled}

use_cases.name: Send Prompt & Stream Response
use_cases.description: Submit a user message, trim history, build messages list, call raw_ask() generator, yield text chunks, and append assistant reply to history.
call_chain: raw_ask() yields text chunks + returns content_blocks
ask() appends assistant content to self.history

use_cases.name: Send Prompt to Anthropic API (Text Protocol)
use_cases.description: ClaudeSession.raw_ask() builds Anthropic-protocol payload with prompt caching headers, posts to /messages, parses SSE stream.
use_cases.notes: Header: x-api-key + anthropic-version + prompt-caching-2024-07-31 beta. make_messages() stamps last 2 user msgs with cache_control: ephemeral

use_cases.name: Send Prompt to OAI-Compatible API (Text Protocol)
use_cases.description: LLMSession.raw_ask() converts messages Claude→OAI format and delegates to _openai_stream().
use_cases.notes: Kimi/Moonshot temperature forced to 1.0; MiniMax temperature clamped to (0.01, 1.0]. model name 'minimax' triggers temp clamp.

use_cases.name: Send Prompt to Anthropic API (Native Tool Protocol)
use_cases.description: NativeClaudeSession.raw_ask() sends native API tool-calling payload with full Claude Code beta headers, handles streaming or non-streaming mode.
use_cases.notes: beta headers: claude-code-20250219, interleaved-thinking, redact-thinking, prompt-caching-scope. [1m] suffix triggers context-1m-2025-08-07 beta. fake_cc_system_prompt=True inserts system into first user message for CC-relay channels. sk-ant- key → x-api-key header; others → Bearer

use_cases.name: Send Prompt to OAI API (Native Tool Protocol)
use_cases.description: NativeOAISession.raw_ask() converts messages and calls _openai_stream() with native tools.
use_cases.notes: Inherits NativeClaudeSession.ask() — returns MockResponse with thinking, content, tool_calls, raw

use_cases.name: Fail Over Across Multiple Backends
use_cases.description: MixinSession wraps multiple session backends (all Native or all non-Native), tries them in order on error, with exponential backoff and optional spring-back to primary.
call_chain: _raw_ask() → _pick() [spring-back: return to primary after spring_back seconds]
on error chunk: advance to next session idx
on success after failover: self._cur_idx = idx; self._switched_at = time.time()
use_cases.notes: Broadcasts system/tools/temperature/max_tokens/reasoning_effort setattr to all sessions. All sessions must be same group (all Native or all non-Native).

use_cases.name: Compress History to Save Tokens
use_cases.description: Truncate <thinking>, <think>, <tool_use>, <tool_result>, <history>, <key_info> tags in older messages. Runs every 5th call by default, or forced.
call_chain: compress_history_tags() → throttle: runs every 5th call (_cd % 5 == 0) or when force=True
Truncates tag content in messages[:-keep_recent] to max_len chars
use_cases.notes: Called automatically from trim_messages_history(). Regex patterns for: thinking, think, tool_use, tool_result, history, key_info tags.

use_cases.name: Trim Message History
use_cases.description: Keep context within window by compressing then dropping oldest messages until cost < context_win * 3 * 0.6.
call_chain: if cost > context_win*3: compress_history_tags(history, keep_recent=4, force=True)
while cost > target: history.pop(0); sanitize leading user msg

use_cases.name: Optimize Token Budget (Tool Prompt Deduplication)
use_cases.description: ToolClient tracks last tools JSON; if unchanged and auto_save_tokens=True, substitutes abbreviated tool instruction to avoid re-sending full tool schemas. Token counter resets after 9000 tokens.
use_cases.notes: This is what 'save_token' refers to in the scope — ToolClient.auto_save_tokens feature, not a standalone function/class

use_cases.name: Apply Thinking Mode
use_cases.description: Configure and apply Claude thinking/reasoning: thinking_type (adaptive/enabled/disabled), thinking_budget_tokens, reasoning_effort (mapped to output_config.effort for Claude).
use_cases.notes: xhigh → 'max' in output_config.effort. none/minimal unsupported for Claude, logged as WARN. Applies to both ClaudeSession and NativeClaudeSession.

use_cases.name: Parse Streaming SSE Response (Anthropic)
use_cases.description: Parse Anthropic SSE event stream: message_start (cache stats), content_block_start/delta/stop (text, thinking, tool_use blocks), message_delta (stop_reason, output_tokens).

use_cases.name: Parse Streaming SSE Response (OAI)
use_cases.description: Parse OpenAI SSE stream for chat_completions or responses API mode. Handles function_call delta accumulation and usage stats.
use_cases.function: _parse_openai_sse(resp_lines, api_mode) → yields text, returns content_blocks list

use_cases.name: Chat via Text Protocol Wrapper
use_cases.description: ToolClient.chat() builds a full text-protocol prompt embedding tools as JSON in system text, dispatches to backend.ask(), parses mixed response for tool_use XML tags.

use_cases.name: Chat via Native Tool Protocol Wrapper
use_cases.description: NativeToolClient.chat() assembles structured user message dict with tool_result blocks, injects thinking-prompt into system, calls backend.ask(merged_dict).
call_chain: returns MockResponse with thinking, content, tool_calls

session_class_hierarchy: ClaudeSession(BaseSession): raw_ask→Anthropic /messages SSE, make_messages→prompt cache stamps
MixinSession (wraps list of sessions, provides fallback raw_ask with retry)
client_wrappers: ToolClient (wraps BaseSession subclass, text-protocol tool calling, auto_save_tokens)
NativeToolClient (wraps NativeClaudeSession/NativeOAISession, native API tool calling)
key_relationships: NativeOAISession extends NativeClaudeSession (shares ask() returning MockResponse)
All sessions use auto_make_url() to normalize apibase + path
_load_mykeys() provides credentials used in all session __init__
compress_history_tags() called by trim_messages_history() called by every ask()
key_data_objects: MockResponse: {thinking: str, content: str, tool_calls: [MockToolCall], raw: str, stop_reason: str}
mykeys dict: loaded from mykey.py or mykey.json — contains apikey, apibase, model, proxy, etc.
important_notes: save_token in the IR/plan is NOT a standalone class — it refers to ToolClient.auto_save_tokens=True feature that deduplicates tool schema injection to save tokens
ApiBase is not a class — auto_make_url() handles URL normalization: host:port → +/v1/path, host/v1 → +/path, host/v1/path → as-is
_load_mykeys lazy-loads via module __getattr__ — mykeys and proxies are cached in globals after first access
MiniMax accessible via two protocols: OAI path (LLMSession) returns <think> tags; Anthropic path (NativeClaudeSession) is cleaner
Prompt cache: ClaudeSession stamps last 2 user msgs with cache_control:ephemeral; NativeClaudeSession uses prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05 beta
Streaming is generator-based throughout — raw_ask() is a generator that yields chunks and returns content_blocks via StopIteration.value
fake_cc_system_prompt=True required for CC-switch/relay channels — inserts system into first user message content instead of system field
compress_history_tags throttled: only runs every 5th call unless force=True; force resets counter
